methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Drones & Autonomous (found 2 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 5 same-sector peers exist in Drones & Autonomous, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

private.name: Joby Aviation
private.rationale: Same sector (Drones & Autonomous), same stage (Public), post-money $10B+

private.name: Archer Aviation
private.rationale: Same sector (Drones & Autonomous), same stage (Public), post-money $5B

data.narrative:
ideaForge is a public-stage drone and autonomous systems company founded by Ankit Mehta, having raised $50M+ to date. The Drones & Autonomous sector contains six private comparable companies, including Joby Aviation, Archer Aviation, Zipline, Nuro, and Elroy Air, though no direct public peers exist in this narrow category.

The peer-median valuation method is not applicable to this analysis. The comparable universe in Drones & Autonomous contains only two companies at ideaForge's stage, with zero additional peers in adjacent stages or comparable valuation tiers. A meaningful triangulation requires a minimum of three datapoints within a narrowly filtered peer set; relying on the full five-company sector median would conflate materially different business models, geographies, and revenue stages. The data density does not support quantitative benchmarking through this method.

Without applicable triangulation methods supported by sufficient datapoints, a valuation range cannot be responsibly derived from the current comparable set. The analysis surface insufficient evidence to anchor a specific multiple or absolute valuation. Proceeding would require either: expansion of the comparable universe to adjacent robotics or aerospace sectors; application of revenue or cost-based methods if financial metrics were available; or acceptance of a wider confidence interval pending additional market transactions in the Drones & Autonomous category. Further diligence is necessary before publishing a supported range.
